meta.title: AI-Powered MIDI Generation: Advanced Mode
meta.description:
In this opportunity, we're going to use ChatGPT to generate MIDI files, but we're taking it to a much more advanced level, with far better prompts. Ready for the grand MIDI adventure?

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
__________________________________________________

chatGPT:
https://openai.com/blog/chatgpt

Colab Notebook:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/colab-notebook-84107536?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link

chatGPT prompt - Text to Melody:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/chatgpt-prompt-84107618?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link

chatGPT prompt - Text to Chords (only for patreons):
https://www.patreon.com/posts/chatgpt-prompt-84107694?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link

chatGPT prompt - Text to Drums (only for patreons):
https://www.patreon.com/posts/chatgpt-prompt-84107718?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link

__________________________________________________
00:00 intro
02:00 How to prompt chatGPT for music
03:17 Google bard to MIDI
04:28 Melodies with chatGPT
07:08 A.I. chords
10:38 A.I. Drums
12:02 Full MIDI songs
13:49 Outro
